creator: rakuco@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to toyokun from comment #2)
> (In reply to Raphael Kubo da Costa from comment #1)
> 
> This patch is for original program.

I know, I'm asking _you_ to generate a new patch that can be properly applied instead. It saves other people's time (I can spend the same amount of time committing more PRs from more maintainers) and the patch committed to the tree will correspond to what was attached to this bug.

> Please move this file on the /usr/ports/net/aprsc/files directory.
